name: cassandra
explanation: Cassandra is a JMXFetch-based integration: the spec inherits `template: instances/jmx` and sets `is_jmx: true`. JMX collection requires a JVM-level connection to the Cassandra JMX port (default 7199) and, in any production deployment, JMX authentication credentials (user + password). The credentials are provisioned out-of-band by the cluster operator and cannot be derived from the wire. Per the procedure's pattern I, JMXFetch integrations are categorically `impossible` for generic auto-config.
notes: Default JMX port 7199 is universal but irrelevant given the auth requirement. JMX is also typically bound to localhost-only by default, so even unauthenticated discovery is gated on JMX remote being explicitly enabled.
